title: Flow cytometer with adjustable positional offset sort deflection plates and methods of using the same
abstract: Aspects of the present disclosure include a particle sorter with a droplet deflector configured to apply a known offset deflection force to a droplet stream. Particle sorters according to certain embodiments include a flow cell, a light source, e.g., laser, for irradiating an interrogation point of the flow cell, a detector for detecting light from the interrogation point, a droplet generator for producing a droplet stream from fluid exiting the flow cell and a droplet deflector configured to apply a known offset deflection force to the droplet stream. In some cases, the droplet deflector comprises first and second plates configured to be offset from one another. Methods and particle sorting modules for applying a known offset deflection force are also provided.
claims: 1. A method comprising: irradiating with a light source an interrogation point of a flow cell; detecting light from the interrogation point with a detector; producing a droplet stream from fluid exiting the flow cell with a droplet generator; adjusting a position of a first plate of a droplet deflector relative to a second plate of the droplet deflector and with respect to a horizontal plane perpendicular to the axis of the droplet stream by laterally offsetting the first plate by translating the first plate along a y-axis only, wherein the y-axis is orthogonal to a z-axis defined by the droplet stream exiting the flow cell and also orthogonal to an x-axis defined by a line between the first and second plates of the droplet deflector, while holding the second plate in a fixed position such that the droplet deflector is configured to apply a known offset deflection force to the droplet stream; and deflecting droplets of the droplet stream with the droplet deflector.
